arts.ttl: 'I think': Sky Sports commentator thinks three Nottingham Forest stars are so important for Nuno
What Crystal Palace need to do to return to winning ways
arts.sum: Still without a Premier League win this season, Oliver Glasner and Palace have plenty to work on. This has in part contributed to a vulnerability to fast breaks - in that situation, only one club has faced more shots than Palace, while only one team has conceded more goals.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest want £50m-rated winger who dribbles better than Anthony Elanga
Eddie Howe has underwhelming alternative on shortlist if Marc Guehi January approach fails
arts.sum: Marc Guehi is Eddie Howe’s first-choice central defender. The 46-year-old tried to sign the Crystal Palace centre-back in the summer but saw four bids, including one worth £70 million, turned down. The Eagles obviously want to keep hold of the England international and have hopes of extending his contract, which is due to expire in […] The post Eddie Howe has underwhelming alternative on shortlist if Marc Guehi January approach fails appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: The Reds face Crystal Palace on Monday!

arts.ttl: 'Fantastic': Ryan Yates learns from £100,000-a-week Nottingham Forest star every single day
arts.sum: Forest have strength in depth this season!

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Crystal Palace: Premier League streak on line in City Ground encounter
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will be attempting to extend a Premier League streak when they square off against Crystal Palace at the City Ground on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Matchday Warm-up: Name the 2011 Palace side who won at Forest
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's return to Premier League action sees them take on Nottingham Forest at the City Ground – but how well do you remember our last victory by the River Trent?

arts.ttl: ‘That’s what I’ll be demanding’ - Bromley boss wants Crystal Palace loanee to start adding goal contributions to positive performances
arts.sum: Imray should have registered an assist to open the scoring in the 30th minute when he crossed low for Olufela Olomola, who put his effort over the bar after standing just inches away from the goal line. Bromley boss Andy Woodman wants Crystal Palace loanee Danny Imray to start turning his positive performances into goal returns.
